name: Wave Kids' Bath Rug Navy - Pillowfort™: Tufted Cotton Bath Mat, 1'8"x2'10", OEKO-TEX Certified, Machine Washable
description: Complete their bathroom decor with this Navy Wave Bath Rug from Pillowfort™. This rectangular bath mat makes a great addition to their bathroom essentials. It features a navy wave pattern on a blue backdrop for a playful look. The 100% cotton construction makes it highly absorbent, while the tufted texture provides them fluffy and soft comfort underfoot when they brush their teeth or step out of the shower. Coordinate with similar bath accessories to bring a cohesive look to their bathroom. Rug pad recommended.
